plans.title: Contract And Registry
plans.description: Define command data, availability, and ownership boundaries.

tasks.title: T001 Define command registry model and action schema
tasks.description: Create stable command fields, action kinds, and payload contract.

tasks.title: T002 Define command availability rules and disabled reason behavior
tasks.description: Define enabled, disabled, and hidden states for global and contextual commands.

plans.title: Composer UI
plans.description: Open, filter, and render the command palette from the composer.

tasks.title: T003 Add composer slash-token detection without breaking normal messages
tasks.description: Detect command invocation while preserving regular chat text.

tasks.title: T004 Build mobile command palette UI with filter, empty, loading, and disabled states
tasks.description: Render command suggestions safely on small mobile viewports.

plans.title: Command Dispatch
plans.description: Execute selected commands through safe action routing.

tasks.title: T005 Register initial global commands
tasks.description: Provide the first global command set for mobile chat.

tasks.title: T006 Implement /new-project as an alias of the existing New Project entry
tasks.description: Route the slash command to the current New Project flow without duplicating state.

tasks.title: T010 Implement command dispatch for insert, open panel, route, backend, and callback actions
tasks.description: Support each action kind through one safe dispatcher.

tasks.title: T011 Add backend capability checks or frontend capability guards
tasks.description: Disable commands when backend support is missing.

tasks.title: T012 Add safety gates for mutating or long-running commands
tasks.description: Prevent accidental mutation or job starts.

tasks.title: T013 Add unknown-command and unavailable-command error handling
tasks.description: Return clear UI feedback when a command cannot run.

tasks.title: T007 Add contextual command provider interface for feature modules
tasks.description: Expose a provider contract for feature-owned commands.

tasks.title: T008 Register New Project contextual commands as placeholders or callbacks
tasks.description: Make project commands available only during project intake.

tasks.title: T009 Register Workbench and Apps commands backed by existing UI actions
tasks.description: Connect command palette entries to existing panels.

plans.title: Validation And Release
plans.description: Test command behavior and release if needed.

tasks.title: T014 Add model tests for command parsing, filtering, and availability
T015 Add widget tests for palette rendering and command selection
T016 Add regression tests that ordinary slash-containing messages still send normally
tasks.description: Prevent command parsing from corrupting normal chat.

tasks.title: T017 Run mobile analyze and tests
tasks.description: Validate the frontend package and mobile app.

tasks.title: T018 Publish Android release if frontend code changes ship to users
tasks.description: Use the standard Android release flow only after tests pass.
